banner.title: We use cookies
banner.leadPrefix: We use strictly necessary cookies to run the app. With your permission we also use optional analytics and marketing cookies. Read our

preferences.title: Cookie preferences
preferences.descriptionPrefix: Choose which optional cookies we may use. You can change this anytime. See our

necessary.label: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: Required for sign-in, security, and core app features (including session and UI preference storage). Always active.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: Helps us understand how the product is used (page views, feature adoption). No advertising profiles.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: Used to measure campaigns and personalize outreach. Disabled in the default demo build.
